caption: A man with short light-brown hair, wearing a navy blue blazer over a dark shirt, stands behind a podium against a plain light-colored wall. In the upper left, he stands still with his arms by his sides. As the sequence progresses, he begins to gesture with his hands, moving them in front of him and then extending his arms outward to emphasize his speech. A thin microphone stands on the podium to his left, and a clear plastic water bottle with a blue label sits before him. The logo "mediasite by koretechnologies" is visible in the upper left corner of each frame. The scene remains static in terms of setting and lighting, focusing entirely on the man's upper body and his changing hand gestures as he speaks.
